text: Honestly, this could be the next great anime! However, the animation needs a bit of work. But I think if the creators of XDragoon allowed Viz or some other company to make it into an anime, it would be huge. Anthropomorphic characters are quite popular in media, one example that proves it is the Sly Cooper games. Bottom line, I am praying for this to be an anime in the future (including an English dub).

text:
"She has some things under her shirt and nothing in her head."
"Who's this Renata, Alfred?"
*sweatdrop* "No, Renata! You have nothing under your shirt and big things in your head!"
"WHAT?" *whack*

Also, that's a nice nut-kicking scene. XD

I started reading the comics. I'll make sure to watch all videos, too.

text:
the animation is actually very well done and professional looking. It's action filled and at times very funny.
The effects are well done as well.
However the only down side is the parts where characters would be shouting/screaming, it sounds unrealistic and very low. Of course I understand if the voicing was done somewhere where you couldn't be loud. But other than that, it's fantastic. :)
Keep up the good work!
